title: Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime Voice Agent Loop
subtitle: A realtime speech system that listens, reasons, speaks, and calls tools within a single interaction loop.

nodes.label: Microphone Audio
nodes.description: Streaming audio chunks captured from the user's microphone.

nodes.label: Speech Model
nodes.description: Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime processes speech input and generates streaming text/audio or function calls.

nodes.label: Streaming Output
nodes.description: Incremental text and audio responses sent back to the client in real time.

nodes.label: Tool Execution
nodes.description: Client-side execution of external tools (e.g., APIs, databases) based on the model's function call request.
nodes.evidence: Function Calling makes the voice agent useful

edges.label: audio stream
edges.evidence: The Short Version: client streams microphone audio

edges.label: streaming response
edges.evidence: Streaming Output: text and audio arrive incrementally

edges.label: function_call
edges.evidence: Function Calling: model requests tool call

edges.label: tool result
edges.evidence: Function Calling loop: client returns tool result
